remarks: Build your dream home on this exceptional residential lot in the desirable West Norwalk area. This level parcel offers an excellent opportunity to construct a custom single-family residence in an established neighborhood. Conveniently located near schools, parks, shopping, dining, Metro-North, and major highways, providing an ideal balance of privacy and accessibility. Bring your builder and your vision to create the home you've always wanted. ask seller for zoning, permits, utilities, and building approvals. A rare opportunity to own a buildable lot in one of Norwalk's most sought-after locations.
